View 64260 Dunmer Cultural Garb This stylish Dark Elf clothing displays a variety of garish colors. 0 1 -1 Disguise Disguise Appearance 0 0 1 Yes Yes -1 -1
View 64266 Brain Broth Alcoholic Drink Jewelry Intricate 1 1 5 Drink Distillate Beverage Trophy 0 0 -1 Increases inspiration gained from deconstruction of this item by |cffffff400|r%, and gain additional refined material upon deconstruction of this item. Yes -1 -1
View 64267 Illegible Page From the Oghma Infinium This torn page depicts multiple circular diagrams adorned with Daedric letters in a deep, black ink. Artwork, Ritual Objects, Writings 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64268 Piece of Volendrung's Handle Reputedly of Rourken clan make, this shattered hilt-shard is emblazoned with the blunt runes of the Dwarves. Oddities, Tools, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64269 Golden Tooth of a Golden Saint A detailed emblem depicting an elderly man with three faces is carved into this gleaming tooth. Artwork, Oddities, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64270 Haft of a Daedric Scythe This hilt begins and ends with silver guards, though the blades are missing. A single, fanged Daedric letter adorns each hilt. Tools, Artwork, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64271 Bone Fragment From the Spine of Ashpit This grey block is so light as to be hollow, and it sheds dust of a similar color as if it were made of the stuff. Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64272 Star Tooth Shard This thin slice of crystal glows with a soft, inner light. Lights, Magic Curiosities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64273 Blade From a Razor Pit Daedric inscriptions adorn this scalpel-thin blade in a stark, blood-red. Tools, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64274 Petal From the Sanguine Rose From a rare flower said to bloom in the myriad planes of Oblivion. Ritual Objects, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64275 Jar of Wild Hunt Vapor An Altmeri label on this jar of thick, vacuous liquid claims it was collected in the wake of a Wild Hunt in Skyrim. Dishes and Cookware, Magic Curiosities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64276 Dwemer Animunculi Schematics These complex schematics detail several types of Dwemer builder constructs. Artwork, Maps, Writings 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64277 Vein From the Heart of Lorkhan This red, crystal vein is said to have been chipped from the Heart of Lorkhan itself. Magic Curiosities, Ritual Objects, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64278 Vial of Ashpit Air This small ampoule is filled with a thick, roiling vapor. A small label with Mages Guild letterhead reads, "Air from Ashpit." Dishes and Cookware, Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64279 Haft-Shard of Sunder A massive splinter of rune-carved oak, this artifact seems to be evidence of Kagrenac's legendary tools. Tools, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64280 Banner of House Dagoth This ancient banner is torn, but the seal of the infamous House Dagoth shines through despite the grime and tattered cloth. Dry Goods, Wall Décor 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64281 Ruby From the Ruby Throne This sparkling gem is the size of a grown Orc's fist and has been shaped to form a simulacrum of the Imperial Ruby. Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64282 Box of Shehai Essence This wooden box is covered in Yokudan runes. Altmeri writing on an attached label reads, "Essence of Shattered Spirit Sword." Artwork, Writings, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64283 Auriel's Quiver This ivory case is embossed with gold. Scholarly markings identify it as "Auriel's Quiver," for whatever that's worth. Oddities, Wardrobe Accessories, Tools 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64284 Sword-Singer Manual This well-worn collection of pages lacks a proper cover, but contains detailed diagrams and illustrations of sword techniques. Writings, Artwork, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64285 Dwemer Red Mountain Standard This tattered banner bearing the seal of some forgotten Dwemeri house is said to have come from the battlefield of Red Mountain. Wall Décor, Dry Goods, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64286 Shatter-Shard of Mehrunes' Razor This piece of shattered black metal seems to drink light. Part of an emblazoned Daedric script runs along its length. Smithing Equipment, Oddities, Tools 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64287 Lantern of the Golden Era This fog lamp bears the crest of the "Golden Era," flagship for the fabled All-Flags Navy. Lights, Tools, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64288 Hairbrush of the First Mane The headdress worn by Rid-Thar-ri'Datta was woven from the manes of two dozen chieftains. It required a lot of brushing. Grooming Items, Wardrobe Accessories, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64289 Hunding's Blade-Shard A shard from the shattered blade of Frandar Hunding himself, a relic of the battle at Hattu Mountain. Smithing Equipment, Ritual Objects, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64290 Prayer Cloth of the Yokudan War-Gods An ancient wall scroll studied by the Maidens of the Spirit Sword, somehow spirited away from the now-lost island nation. Dry Goods, Ritual Objects, Artwork 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64291 Serpent-Veil of Orgnum Tattered silk embroidered with Maormer runes of rulership and bearing the entwined image of mating sea serpents. Artwork, Wardrobe Accessories 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64292 Many-Hued Bird Feather Touching this feather brings a happy little tune, and a brush of mania, to your mind. Oddities, Musical Instruments, Magic Curiosities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64293 Ancestor Moth Pupa A green-hued casing from the molt of a rare Ancestor Moth. It smells ever so faintly of fresh grass and clean water. Oddities, Ritual Objects, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64294 Stamp of the Black Drake A cracked stamp, an official seal from the reign of Durcorach, the first of the Longhouse Emperors. Scrivener Supplies, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64295 Deathbringer Clan Facepaint This small pot of facepaint smells pungently of blood. The sigil of Valkynaz Seris is stamped on the bottom of the glass. Trifles and Ornaments, Oddities, Cosmetics 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64296 Skaal-Carved Horker Tusk This scrimshaw depicts the early ancestors of the Skaal people running their boats aground on the isle of Solstheim. Artwork, Trifles and Ornaments, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64297 Bendu Olo's Sextant The precision of this instrument is uncanny despite its age—a worthy tool for Baron-Admiral Bendu Olo of the All Flags Navy. Devices, Fishing Supplies, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64298 Fang of Krahjotdaan Faded inscriptions cover the surface of this prodigious yellow fang. They depict the slaying of the high Dragon Krahjotdaan. Artwork, Oddities, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64299 Sacred Inkwell of Marukh the Seer This finely crafted inkwell was likely used by the prophet Marukh during the days of the Alessian Order. Ritual Objects, Scrivener Supplies 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64300 Bolt of the Numidium A massive dwarven bolt, unnaturally warm to the touch. Scholarly markings link it to the legendary Brass God, Numidium. Magic Curiosities, Ritual Objects, Tools 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64301 Scute of the Mock Turtle Most scholars dismiss tales of a massive turtle dwelling beyond the Weir Gate as pure nonsense … but this shell is really big. Oddities, Trifles and Ornaments 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64302 Blood of St. Pelin This crystal phial is full of what is said to be the blood of St. Pelin the martyr. Even if emptied, the blood always returns. Magic Curiosities, Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64303 Plait of Jurgen Windcaller's Beard This ancient nord coffer contains a long braid of gray hair. The plait almost certainly came from the chin of Jurgen Windcaller. Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64304 Eldergleam Amber A gleaming golden amber that sings a faint and soothing melody. It could only have come from the ancient tree, Eldergleam. Lights, Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64305 Ashes of Lamae Beolfag Looking at these ashes elicits a deep revulsion. They were likely taken from the pyre of the first vampire, Lamae Beolfag. Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64306 Phial of Daedric Whispers This glass phial appears to be empty, but utters dark and seductive whispers when uncorked. The voice is likely that of Mephala. Magic Curiosities, Oddities, Ritual Objects 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64307 Morihaus Wing Feather A massive golden feather that is lighter than a sparrow, but stronger than steel. This may be a relic of the legendary Morihaus. Magic Curiosities, Oddities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64308 Shard of the Ideal Masters This sliver of crystal buzzes angrily, releasing intermittent pulses of purple light. It may be a fragment of an Ideal Master. Oddities, Lights, Magic Curiosities 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64309 Ancient Dragonguard Burial Mask This ancient silver mask is of Akaviri design. It bears the likeness of a hissing serpent devouring the Dragon Vuljotnaak. Artwork, Ritual Objects, Wardrobe Accessories 1500 1 4 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64310 Bucket "A Bucket helm? Nope, sorry—who would wear such a thing? It's far too silly and undignified. Be off. …Ha ha ha, fooled you! That sounds splendid! Where can I get one?" —Sir Cadwell of Codswallop 0 1-CP160 1-5 Apparel Armor Head Heavy Weapon 73-2425 0 1 Yes -1 -1
View 64311 Broom "Lifts-Her-Tail: 'But, my lord, your broom is so very long and stiff! To move it back and forth, I shall have to use both hands!'" — Excerpt from The Dusty Argonian Maid 0 1-CP160 1-5 Weapon Weapon Two Hand Two Handed Hammer Weapon 0 198-1571 1 -1 -1
View 64312 False Teeth Collection A small collection of false teeth, in a mixed assortment of brass and iron. Some are still flecked with dried blood. Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64313 Twisted Nose Ring This bronze-plated hoop became twisted when it was torn from the nostril of a combatant, skin chunk and all. Wardrobe Accessories, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64314 Decorative Scalp A long set of hair pleats threaded with small glass beads, still attached to a desiccated chunk of skull and skin. Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64315 Not-So-Lucky Nose Needle A long steel needle, once slotted firmly through the nose of a mighty warrior before it was forcibly removed. Oddities, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64316 Tattoo-Skin Wrist Cozy This wristband shows off the delicate tattoo artistry sought out by the skin's original owner. Oddities, Artwork 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64317 Polished Gut-Rock The remnants of a painful buildup passed through the body. Some are polished to a dull sheen and sold by artistic alchemists. Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64318 Skeever Skull Trophy A massive alit fang driven straight through the skull of a skeever. The fang is decorated with rustic symbols. Trifles and Ornaments, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64319 Kwama Egg Stein A crude stein fashioned from a resin-hardened kwama egg. Drinkware 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64320 Scorpion Barb Sewing Needle A thick barb from a giant scorpion, modified with an eyelet to accommodate ropy thread. Utensils, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64321 Scrimshaw Boot Scraper The end of a carved mammoth's tusk serves as the perfect instrument to scrape mud off of one's boots. Utensils, Wardrobe Accessories, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64322 Harpy Feather Pillow A small road pillow stuffed with harpy feathers. It smells absolutely terrible. Dry Goods 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64323 Traveling Smith's Kit A dusty satchel with a scratched hammer, tongs, and a cracked set of bellows. Smithing Equipment, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64324 Moon-Sugar Chawbox A small tin box for holding "chewing sugar," a thick form of moon-sugar favored by Baandari traders. Utensils, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64325 Practice Sword Hilt The cracked hilt of a wooden practice sword. It is sized for a child's hand and carefully wrapped in a piece of cloth. Children's Toys 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64326 Cast Iron Toothed Spoon A well-used travel utensil, still flecked with its owner's last meal. Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64327 Tin of Wound Resin A small tin of amber resin, used to seal up small cuts after a fight. Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64328 Torn Dominion Rank Insignia A rank insignia torn from the uniform of a Dominion officer. Dark stains suggest they did not survive the encounter. Trifles and Ornaments, Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64329 Torn Pact Rank Insignia A rank insignia torn from the uniform of a Pact officer. Dark stains suggest they did not survive the encounter. Trifles and Ornaments, Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64330 Torn Covenant Rank Insignia A rank insignia torn from the uniform of a Covenant officer. Dark stains suggest they did not survive the encounter. Trifles and Ornaments, Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64331 Wolf Leg Baton A wolf's leg reinforced with an iron rod makes for a fierce and festive parade ornamentation. Trifles and Ornaments, Tools 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64332 Cocoa-Coated Leaf Pack A small leather pack filled with cocoa-dusted leaves. When added to tea, it adds a delightful chocolatey tang. Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64333 Royal Cartographer's Kit This sturdy satchel contains a silver-coated sextant, fine vellum, inks, and a number of quills. Scrivener Supplies, Maps 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64334 Axe-Haft Incense Holder An incense holder made from the scarred base of a battleaxe haft. A crude inscription reads "Peace, Not Blood." Smithing Equipment, Trifles and Ornaments 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64335 Dwemer-Metal Shavings A leather pouch containing Dwemer metal shavings, meticulously sliced from a construct. Smithing Equipment 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64336 Finger Bone Charm A calcified finger bone hangs from a simple wrist chain. There is no indication of its original owner. Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64337 Obsidian Mini Cleaver A stone meat cleaver, sized for the hands of a small child. It is razor sharp to the touch. Utensils 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64338 Orichalcum Mystery Sphere A dozen colored glass beads cross its surface. Touching a bead causes the color to change, but nothing else seems to happen. Magic Curiosities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64339 Hematite Worry Stone A silvery-black worry stone with the symbol of Mephala on its surface. Rubbing it causes blinding headaches. Ritual Objects, Magic Curiosities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64340 Horrified Flesh-Mask The dried, frayed face of an elf. The expression on its face is one of abject horror. Either a trophy or a conversation piece. Oddities, Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64341 Preserved Sheogorath Tract A bottle of an unidentified liquid, in which floats a chapbook of mad lore. It's unclear how the book got inside the bottle. Writings, Ritual Objects, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64342 Ivory Abacus Rod This ivory rod has six flat sides, each inscribed with simple equations. Intended to help young scholars learn their maths. Devices, Tools 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64343 Dwarven-Rune Handkerchief A high quality silk handkerchief, artfully embroidered with Dwemeri runes across its surface. Wardrobe Accessories, Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64344 Sload Stomach Pouch A torn coin pouch, apparently made from the voluminous stomach of a Sload bloat-warrior. Wardrobe Accessories, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64345 Wamasu Organ Lantern A metal frame sheathed in leather, surrounding the "lightning organ" of a wamasu. It gives off a bright, intermittent light. Lights, Tools 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64346 Imga Fur Hand Warmer A luxurious hand warmer made from a thick, warm pelt. A sewn label inside claims it was made from a "treacherous" Imga. Wardrobe Accessories, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64347 Hist Bark Cane A cane made of twisted and blackened bark. Putting an ear to the wood allows one to hear quiet sobbing, as if from far off. Medical Supplies, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64348 Dreugh Wax Corker A wax stopper for any open bottle. Some swear it makes the contents more flavorful; others claim it adds a waxy aftertaste. Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64349 Sanguine Devotional Card An illustrated card depicting the Daedric Prince Sanguine offering the bearer a bottle. Artwork, Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64350 Pouch of "Coins" Flattened brass discs good for fooling less-than-sober gamblers. Best used in poorly lit rooms. Games 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64351 Skeever Tail Stirring Stick A skeever's tail, preserved in wax. Some believe stirring one's drink with it brings good luck. Others believe it's disgusting. Utensils, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64352 Prurient Kerchief A kerchief with a red-stained beeswax kiss pressed into it. A blackmailer might find this useful. Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64353 Pocket Goblin A small pewter Goblin. It is said to bring good luck when dropped into any drink. (But not wine. Never wine.) Statues, Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64354 Cat Whisker Ear Scraper A small stick with cat whiskers glued to the end, intended to clean one's ears. A forger might have use for this. Grooming Items 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64355 Tippler's Tiny Tidbit Tin An empty circular tin with four-section divider. Typically used to carry morsels that pair best with drink. Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64356 Piffle Trumpet A tiny conical brass bell tapering into a small tube. When held to the ear, one can overhear distant gossip at loud parties. Medical Supplies, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64357 "Gentle Touch" Servant Baton A baton with a sponge on the end. Once sold as a merciful way to strike misbehaving servants, it has since found other uses. Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64358 Autographed Calling Card A signed, sloppily illustrated card depicting someone of indeterminate race and gender. A forger might find use for this. Artwork 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64359 Palm Flask A small wooden container with a hidden reservoir. It can easily be hidden in a coin pouch, a sleeve, or the palm of one's hand. Drinkware, Devices 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64360 Hooked Scraper A small hooked metal tool designed to clean grime from beneath nails or claws. Grooming Items 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64361 Tin of Eyeblack A foul-smelling, waxy black paste. Rubbing this around the eyes helps reduce the sun's glare. Also useful for sneak thieves. Cosmetics, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64362 Footwear Repair Kit A folded leather kit with tools for repairing sandals, shoes, and boots. It could be useful for traveling forgers. Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64363 Baling Hook A metal hook with a wooden handle, often used for carrying bales of hay. Sneak thieves could fashion it into a crude grapnel. Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64364 Joint Salve Jar A tiny unguent jar. The label claims its powerful numbing properties reduce joint pain. It could be useful to skooma slingers. Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64365 Bloody Buttons' Ragamuffin A ghastly doll depicting the villain of the popular children's tale. Its eyes are red-painted buttons. (It's probably paint.) Dolls 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64366 Knee Pillow A small square of padding with a strap to wrap around one's knee. Dry Goods 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64367 Swaddler's Sack A variety of tightly wrapped bandages, stored in a small leather pouch. Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64368 Planter's Monocular A small, hardy spyglass. Initially sold for farmers in separate fields to see distant hand signals, it's mostly used for spying. Devices, Tools 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64369 Secret Ointment Jar The label claims the jar contains horse liniment, but a hidden internal label declares it "Proud Stallion Bedroom Ointment." Medical Supplies 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64370 Mustache Wax This ghastly-smelling kwama wax is perfect for making facial hair set "just so." Grooming Items, Cosmetics 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64371 Bloody Tongue Stud Some dried blood still clings to this brass tongue piercing. As does a little bit of tongue. Wardrobe Accessories, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64372 Wolfen Socks Hand-knitted socks shaped to fit over the unique structure of a werewolf's foot. Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64373 Scribbled Farm Ideas A torn sheet with dozens of scribbled and crossed-off ideas. The only legible note: "Werewolf Farm: endless wolf steaks." Writings 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64374 Wolf Trick Mirror Looking into the mirror shows you a vision of a wolf superimposed over your face. Grooming Items, Games 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64375 Shredded Pants These simple cotton pants are ripped to shreds, seemingly from powerful legs tearing through the fabric. Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64376 Bristled Fang Brush An oversized toothbrush caked with blood. The cuts into the bristles seem designed to fit large fangs. Grooming Items 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64377 Fang Charm A carefully-made plaster cast of a humanoid fang attached to a simple chain. Wardrobe Accessories, Oddities 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64378 Bronze Tail Chain Bristled fur still clings to this intricate chain, apparently intended to be worn on the tail of a full-sized werewolf. Wardrobe Accessories, Trifles and Ornaments 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64379 Silver Piercing Needle Clearly meant as a body piercing, the blood clinging to this needle still sizzles audibly. Utensils, Wardrobe Accessories 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64380 Golden Fang Caps These gilded tooth caps are shaped to fit over the fangs of a wolf. Cosmetics, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64381 Bag of Letter Tiles Cloth bag of small wooden tiles, each with a letter burned into its face. Used in a traditional commoner spelling game. Games 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64382 Petrified Bull Charm What at first glance appears to be a short, withered cane is actually an ossified bull member … perhaps a lucky charm? Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64383 Disappointing Birdhouse A set of seven rough-cut wood squares, sloppily nailed together to form a very badly-made birdhouse. Trifles and Ornaments 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64384 Practice Whittlestick A whittled stick of wood, twisted and formed at the end into intricate angles and points. A daily project for an apprentice. Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64385 Twisted In-Law Carving A careful carving of a twisted, cruel-looking woman. On the bottom is scrawled "Namira take your first-born, the Mother-in-Law." Statues, Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64386 Favored Shears A pair of clothing shears, well worn from use. A name was once inscribed on the handle, but work has worn it away. Utensils, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64387 Burnt Spellbook The charred husk of a leather spellbook, only recognizable by the runes on the cover. It is warm to the touch. Magic Curiosities, Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64388 Rune Chunk A shattered piece of a once-potent runestone. It hums quietly with latent power. Magic Curiosities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64389 Portal Seed A marble-sized enchanted rock, a common component in apprentice-level portal creation. Magic Curiosities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64390 Spell Gel A jar of sweet-smelling goo labeled "Spell Gel: Hair resin for the active mage!" Magic Curiosities, Grooming Items, Cosmetics 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64391 Taxidermied Kitten A stuffed kitten curled into a ball, appearing very lifelike in death. The leather tag on the collar reads "Thesis Project." Oddities, Trifles and Ornaments 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64392 Vanus Galerion Doll A crude straw representation of Mages Guildmaster Vanus Galerion. A quill is shoved through the doll's eye. Dolls, Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64393 Shalidor's Nail Clippings A small glass phial with curled, yellowed nail clippings inside. Label reads "Archmagus Shalidor." Ritual Objects, Oddities, Magic Curiosities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64394 Spidersilk Kerchief A plain gray kerchief. Primarily used to wipe sweat from one's brow, but strong enough to double as an emergency tourniquet. Wardrobe Accessories, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64395 Temporary Hobbling Stone A smooth, flat stone. It creates a convincing limp when placed inside a footwrap. Useful for paupers in need of added sympathy. Wardrobe Accessories, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64396 Tin of Dubbin A small tin of waterproofing wax. This could be valuable to anyone who travels in wet climates. Or pirates. Smithing Equipment, Fishing Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64397 Poorly Groomed False Teeth A set of disgusting false teeth designed to fit over one's natural, presumably less disgusting teeth. Wardrobe Accessories, Medical Supplies 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64398 Disgusting Prosthetic Nose A false nose with what appears to be a large, hairy boil at the end of it. It could be resold to an actor, or perhaps a spy. Wardrobe Accessories, Medical Supplies 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64399 Prayer Kerchief A colorful kerchief with inspirational prayers worked along the border. Bandit gangs with similar colors could use this. Wardrobe Accessories, Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64403 Balithil's "Potato Porridge" Mushy, foul-smelling, and lukewarm to the touch. The very thought of consuming this is repellent. 0 1 -1 Food Trash Trophy 0 0 -1 Yes -1 -1
View 64404 Simple Stitching Awl This awl is fashioned from bone. Utensils, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64405 Netch-Hide Lunch Sack This empty netch-hide sack smells faintly of hearty bread and pungent cheese. Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64406 Brassy Livestock Whistle A brass whistle in the shape of a leaping guar. Its clarion tone is designed to beckon delicious beasts. Musical Instruments, Artwork 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64407 Wine-Stained Jug An empty wine jug of Imperial design, labeled with the phrase, "Good Will, Good Wine." Drinkware, Dishes and Cookware 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64408 Dried Prayer Garlands Lay priests occasionally hang dried flower garlands from tree branches in offerings to the gods. Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64409 Logic Fob This heavy fob, meant to hang from a bracelet or belt, is mathematically exact in its dimensions. Utensils, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64410 Pungent Incense This pungent incense is traditionally used to mask the odor of rotting corpses. Ritual Objects, Cosmetics 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64411 Claw of Akatosh This large claw, most likely from a troll, is carved with a prayer. Young children are told they're the claws of Dragons. Ritual Objects, Trifles and Ornaments 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64412 Lacquered Feather While lacquered and preserved, this feather catches the air gracefully when released into the wind. Trifles and Ornaments 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64413 Blessed Seed A germinating seed that's been trapped in resin and carved with a prayer. Sometimes ritually planted with a crop. Ritual Objects 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64416 Zenithar's Measure A heavy pewter scale weight engraved with a blue star. Kept in the coinpurse for financial luck in trying times. Ritual Objects, Utensils, Oddities 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64417 Horn of the Chieftain An ox horn elaborately inscribed in the Colovian style with an ancient highlands prayer. Ritual Objects, Musical Instruments 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64418 Stuffed Rat Carcass Stuffed with dried grain, this rat carcass seems to be useful for not only holding down papers but also impromptu tossing games. Oddities, Scrivener Supplies 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64419 Darksky Ritual Sand A pouchful of dyed sand, used by certain occult groups to ritually stain skins and mark foreheads. Ritual Objects, Cosmetics 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64420 Hist-Soaked Vine Clippings Soaked in the hist sap, these vine clippings have become brittle and odiferous. Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64421 Caliper Cozy A knitted pouch for a traveling blacksmith. Keeps soot from one's apron and caliper handles from biting flesh on cold days. Smithing Equipment, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64422 Forgeburn Unguent A jar of lime-green paste to be rubbed upon one's face after a busy day in the forge. Smells faintly of mudcrab effluvia. Smithing Equipment, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64423 Ash-Begone Soap A bar of "soap" that is likely a small block of bleached pumice. The blood it draws helps wash soot-stained hands clean. Smithing Equipment, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64424 Utility Sash A leather workman's sash, fitted with multiple cloth loops to hold nails, small tools, or small vials. Smithing Equipment, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64425 Never-Wet Whetstone An enchanted whetstone. One side exudes a thin sheen of oil when touched to metal. Smithing Equipment, Tools 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64426 Steel Calipers A pair of steel calipers intended for superior measuring, gripping, or holding down of loose papers. Smithing Equipment, Tools 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64427 Smith's Rolling Rule A metallic contraption for measuring heated metal objects. (Truthfully, it's a precisely hash-marked steel rolling pin.) Smithing Equipment, Tools 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64428 Orichalipers This pair of orichalcum calipers provides the best possible measuring, gripping, or holding down of loose papers in Tamriel. Utensils 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64429 Scar Cream A jar of vile-smelling goop. The label insists it can remove scars if applied daily, and liberally, for five consecutive years. Cosmetics, Medical Supplies 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64430 Miniature Silver Puzzlebox An intricate, handheld puzzlebox with a complex internal mechanism. Attempting to solve the puzzle also polishes the silver. Games, Devices 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64431 Fishing Hook A heavy fishing hook. Fishing Supplies, Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64432 Boning Knife A thin, flexible knife for cleaning fish in the field. Fishing Supplies, Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64433 Musty Bait Tin It doesn't smell recognizably like anything. It does smell bad, however. Fishing Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64434 Simple Feather Lure A small white feather, for tying to a fishing line. Fishing Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64435 Hauler's Straps A bundle of leather straps meant to assist in the movement of heavy objects. Tools, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64437 Refreshing Retching Tablets A tin of hardened scrib-jelly tablets packed with scents and herbs. Evidently they freshen breath and intoxicate nix-hounds. Cosmetics, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64438 Vial of Perfumed Rouge A vial of strongly-scented facial cosmetics, for dressing up one's complexion while masking the stench of the common folk. Cosmetics, Grooming Items 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64439 Scented Cosmetic Padding A scented pouch of something soft. Perfect for filling out anywhere one feels might be … lacking. Wardrobe Accessories, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64440 Forge-Blind Drops A vial of grayish liquid with a small dropper. Said to protect one's vision from bright forge fires when dripped onto the eyes. Smithing Equipment, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64441 Bellows Sealant A jar of sticky red sap meant to seal tiny punctures to forge bellows. The label insists the mixture isn't flammable. Smithing Equipment, Medical Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64442 Spool of Bendy Wire A small spool of wire. The wire is soft enough to bend and hard enough to retain its shape once bent. Smithing Equipment 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64443 Arrowhead Mold A small mold for a common arrowhead. The certification stamped on the base would be of interest to crooked smiths. Smithing Equipment 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64444 Forge Mark Stamps A set of personalized stamps used by smiths throughout Tamriel. A forger with a forge might find this valuable. Scrivener Supplies, Smithing Equipment 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64445 Folding Calipers A pair of brass folding calipers for a traveling smith. The grips lock on place when unfolded, nearly doubling its size. Utensils, Smithing Equipment 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64446 Used Candlestick Mold Though the mold itself is worth something, its greater value comes from the partial silver candlestick fitted snuggly inside. Smithing Equipment 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64447 Folding Pocket Rule A stack of hinged, hand-length, hash-marked metal rectangles. They form a leg-length rulestick when rotated and locked in place. Utensils, Smithing Equipment 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64448 Burn Jelly A jar of greasy blue numbing paste applied directly to fresh forge burns. "Do not apply to tongue," the label also reads. Medical Supplies, Smithing Equipment 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64449 Used Dibella Figurine A highly detailed mold used to form a figurine of Dibella. The partial golden remnants of a previous attempt are still inside. Smithing Equipment, Ritual Objects 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64450 Portable Bellows When the metal nozzle is removed and stowed, this small, handheld bellows collapses into a finger-thick circular disc. Smithing Equipment, Devices 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64451 Ever-Breath Smith's Bit An enchanted bit that absorbs common airborne impurities when clenched between the teeth. Best to wash before reuse. Magic Curiosities, Smithing Equipment 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64452 Maormer Waterstone A small, glowing stone that clears water of impurities. Perfect for a smith's trough, or a poisoner looking to refine a recipe. Smithing Equipment, Magic Curiosities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64453 Smith's Detailing Pad A single fireproof pad, meant to fit over a hand or glove. A flame atronach's claw extends from the back. Smithing Equipment, Oddities 250 1 3 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64454 Embossed Throwing Shoes Hard-tempered and neatly forged, these horse shoes are embossed with the symbol of the Rilis household of Auridon. Games, Tools 100 1 2 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64455 Crawler Tube A simple wooden tube used to carry live crawlers. Alternatively, to hide one's gold beneath live crawlers. Fishing Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64456 Hook Sponge At least a dozen intricately fashioned fishhooks jabbed into a sponge. Useful for fisherfolk and desperate cutpurses. Fishing Supplies, Utensils 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64457 Pole Ring Pouch A small pouch with replacement metal rings. Though intended for fishing poles, bandits could use these to fashion rope traps. Fishing Supplies, Wardrobe Accessories 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64458 Measuring Strap A hash-marked leather strap rule, slightly shrunken from water damage. Useful for boastful fisherfolk and crooked merchants. Fishing Supplies, Tools 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64459 Shiny Copper Spinner A lightweight piece of shiny copper, cut to attract a fish's eye in murky water. Fishing Supplies 40 1 1 Treasure Treasure 0 0 1 -1 -1

View 64569 Mark of the Legion This item is no longer used. Placing it in your inventory will consume it automatically, converting to Imperial Key fragments. Treasure Vault Shard 0 1 4 Trophy Key Fragment 0 0 -1 -1 -1
View 64570 Legionary Key The bow of this heavy brass key resembles a broken red diamond. It should unlock the Legionary Trophy Chest. 0 1 4 Trophy Key 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64571 Monstrous Tooth This item is no longer used. Placing it in your inventory will consume it automatically, converting to Imperial Key fragments. Treasure Vault Shard 0 1 4 Trophy Key Fragment 0 0 -1 -1 -1
View 64572 Monstrous Enamel Key This smooth enamel key resembles a beastly fang. It should unlock the Monstrous Tooth Trophy Chest. 0 1 4 Trophy Key 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64573 Bloody Claw This item is no longer used. Placing it in your inventory will consume it automatically, converting to Imperial Key fragments. Treasure Vault Shard 0 1 4 Trophy Key Fragment 0 0 -1 -1 -1
View 64574 Clawed Key This thin steel key is sharp as an assassin's razor. It should unlock the Bloody Claw Trophy Chest. 0 1 4 Trophy Key 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64575 Planar Armor Scraps This item is no longer used. Placing it in your inventory will consume it automatically, converting to Imperial Key fragments. Treasure Vault Shard 0 1 4 Trophy Key Fragment 0 0 -1 -1 -1
View 64576 Planar Key This dark ebony key emits a low, menacing tone when Daedra are near. It should unlock the Planar Armor Trophy Chest. 0 1 4 Trophy Key 0 0 1 -1 -1
View 64578 The First Charter This fabled tome outlines the first laws for the original settlement of Orsinium. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64579 Horn of Beasts Last sounded during the Siege of Old Orsinium, this horn once summoned the beasts of Wrothgar to the city's defense. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64580 Guthrag's Mask Once, this mask allowed Orcs to walk disguised among all the races of Tamriel. Now, it stands as a historic oddity. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64581 Centurion's Signet The Emperor awarded this signet to the first Orsimer to earn the rank of Centurion in the Imperial Legion. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64582 Frostbreak Chalice A goblet emblazoned with the seal of the fort, some Orcs believe it imbued restorative powers on any liquid drunk from it. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64583 Trinimac House Idol This ancient statue once protected the home of a worshiper of Trinimac. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64584 Nuzava's Anvil The travel anvil of the famed forge-wife of Morkul Clanhold, it was said no other smith could use it. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64585 Map of Clans This ancient map displayed the original 13 Orc strongholds at the end of the Dawn Era, but much of it is faded and hard to read. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64586 Dwarf Light A mechanical-looking lantern made by the Dwemer. It no longer functions, but the exquisite crafting is a wonder to behold. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64587 Torc of Baloth Bloodtusk This heavy necklace of gold and bearing the symbol of the hammer once belonged to the legendary Orc leader. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64588 Heart of Zandadunoz This vile relic, once a beating heart, serves as a phylactery that supposedly has the power to recall the titan from Oblivion. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64589 Thukhozod's Bracer According to legend, the first Thukhozod crafted and wore this armband to display his warrior's prowess. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64590 Liquid Silver A vial of heavy, viscous silver, cool to the touch and moving like a thing alive. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64591 Black Quill An enchanted quill made from the feather of a hagraven, legend claims that whatever it writes is never forgotten. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64592 Eye of Zthenganaz According to legend, the Eye was used to spy upon the Orsimer until it was cursed by a powerful shaman. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64593 Scepter of the Riekr King-Chief Once the symbol of power for an Orc chief, the scepter recently rested in the hands of the Riekr king-chief. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64594 Hammer of Glass Though the hammer appears made of glass, it is as hard as diamond. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1
View 64595 Mad Urkazbur's Ice-Effigy Made entirely of ice, this tiny replica of the ogre elder refuses to melt. Donate this to Curator Umutha and the House of Orsimer Glories in Orsinium. 0 1-CP160 1-5 Trophy Quest Starter 0 0 3 Yes -1 -1

View 64699 Old Helm An old helm with a maker's mark from Morkul Stronghold. It's too battered to wear, and the name etched within is too faded to read. 0 1-50 1 None 0 0 1 Yes -1 -1
View 64700 Crown Lesson: Riding Speed Increases your character's riding speed by 1 per lesson. Riding Speed allows you to move faster while mounted and takes effect on your character regardless of the mount you have set active. Your current Riding Speed is 60/60. 0 1 5 Crown Item Crown Item 0 0 1 Yes -1 -1
View 64701 Crown Lesson: Riding Stamina Increases your riding stamina by 1 per lesson. Riding Stamina helps prevent being dismounted, allows your mount to sprint longer, and takes effect on your character regardless of the mount set active. Your current Riding Stamina is 60/60. 0 1 5 Crown Item Crown Item 0 0 1 Yes -1 -1
View 64702 Crown Lesson: Riding Capacity Expands your character's inventory by 1 slot per lesson. Riding Capacity allows you to carry more items and takes effect on your character regardless of the mount you have set active. Your character's current Riding Capacity is 60/60. 0 1 5 Crown Item Crown Item 0 0 1 Yes -1 -1

View 64747 Cuirass of Affliction Argonian Armor Sturdy 7-63 1-CP160 1-5 Apparel Armor Chest Heavy Weapon 84-2772 0 Maximum Health Enchantment Adds 77-954 Maximum Health. Affliction (2 items) Adds 3-129 Weapon and Spell Damage (3 items) Adds 25-1096 Maximum Stamina (4 items) Adds 3-129 Stamina Recovery (5 items) When you deal damage, you deal 330 Disease damage to the target. The enemy is then afflicted with the Diseased status effect, applying Minor Defile to the target, reducing their Healing Received and damage shield strength by 6% for |cffffff4|r seconds.
